# backend/blueprint_library/blueprints.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:53Z

## Purpose
12 reference architecture blueprints · Iter 74.

Per §103 Phase 6 · each blueprint declares:
  · description · use cases · mandatory components (agents · tables · endpoints · UI tabs)
  · estimated cost/time · risk level · dependencies · ADR notes

Operator selects one → API returns the full spec → Phase 7 (Marketplace)
deploys it · audited via §103 mandate.
